title: Aerospace-Grade Cloud Transformation
desc: Secure Cloud Transformation for Aerospace & Defense Modernizing infrastructure with Zero Trust and CMMC-compliant architecture.
label: services
challenge: A growing aerospace and defense contractor supporting government programs needed to modernize its on-premise infrastructure while meeting strict regulatory and security requirements. The organization faced challenges including fragmented legacy systems, limited visibility into security posture, and manual compliance processes that slowed audits and increased risk exposure.

keyRequirements.title: Migration to a secure government-compliant cloud environment
Alignment with CMMC Level 2, NIST 800-171, and DFARS requirements
Secure handling of Controlled Unclassified Information (CUI)
Improved threat detection, monitoring, and access governance

solution.intro: UElement Technologies designed and executed a compliance-first cloud transformation strategy, ensuring security, resilience, and long-term scalability. Our Cloud, Cybersecurity and Governance teams collaborated with the client's IT, security and compliance stakeholders to
items: Conduct a comprehensive security and compliance gap assessment against CMMC and NIST 800-171 controls
Design a secure cloud architecture aligned with defense-grade requirements
Implement a dedicated secure enclave for Controlled Unclassified Information (CUI)
Migrate critical workloads and collaboration platforms to Microsoft Government Cloud (GCC / GCC High)
Deploy Zero Trust architecture with identity-centric access, least-privilege enforcement, and network segmentation
Enable continuous security monitoring, logging, and alerting for proactive threat detection
Establish audit-ready policies, governance frameworks, and automated compliance reporting
solution.conclusion: The solution ensured operational continuity while significantly strengthening the organization's overall security posture.

results: Aligned with CMMC & NIST 800-171 controls, supporting audit readiness
Successful migration to a secure government cloud environment
40% reduction in audit preparation effort through automated compliance reporting
Improved security posture with Zero Trust enforcement and centralized monitoring
Enhanced protection of CUI, meeting defense and regulatory expectations
resultConclusion: The client now operates in a secure, compliant, and scalable cloud environment, prepared for future defense contracts and evolving regulatory demands.

whyUElement.title: Defense-Grade Cloud & Security Expertise for Aerospace and Government Contractors
Deep Compliance Knowledge across CMMC, DFARS, NIST 800-171, and governance frameworks
Zero Trust & Cloud-Native Security Architectures designed for modern threat landscapes
End-to-End Delivery spanning Cybersecurity, Enterprise Cloud, Compliance, and Managed Services
Future-Ready Approach, integrating cloud, AI-driven monitoring, and quantum-safe security

title: Identity Security & Governance Transformation for a Mid-Sized Telecom Provider
desc: Identity Security & Governance Transformation for a Mid-Sized Telecom Provider
label: services
challenge: A mid-sized telecom services provider with thousands of employees and millions of users was struggling with fragmented identity systems, manual access governance, and increasing audit pressure. Rapid growth and legacy IAM processes had resulted in identity sprawl, unmanaged privileged access, and high operational overhead during security audits. The organization lacked centralized visibility into user and privileged access, creating security gaps, compliance risks, and inefficiencies across IT and business teams.

keyRequirements.title: Secure management of Privileged Access across critical systems
Elimination of manual approvals, spreadsheets, and paper-based workflows
Audit-ready identity controls with real-time visibility and reporting
Alignment with Zero Trust and least-privilege security principles
Scalable identity architecture to support cloud and future growth

solution.intro: UElement Technologies, a CyberArk Partner, delivered an identity-first security transformation leveraging the CyberArk Identity Security Platform. Working closely with the client’s IT, security, and compliance teams, UElement implemented:
items: Identity Governance & Administration (IGA) using CyberArk
Role-based and policy-driven access governance
Automated access requests, approvals, and certifications
Centralized visibility and immutable audit trails
Privileged Access Management (PAM) with CyberArk
Vaulting and rotation of privileged credentials
Just-in-Time (JIT) privileged access
Session monitoring and recording for administrators and service accounts
Zero Trust Identity Controls
Least-privilege enforcement across users, applications, and infrastructure
Identity-based access decisions for sensitive workloads
Removal of manual signatures and print-based documentation
Real-time compliance dashboards and continuous monitoring
solution.conclusion: The solution was designed to be secure, scalable, and fully audit-ready without disrupting ongoing operations.

results: Audit posture improved from high-risk to fully compliant
60%+ reduction in audit preparation effort through automation
70% reduction in privileged access risk by eliminating standing admin access
Millions in annualized operational cost savings
Zero manual approvals or paper-based workflows
Faster user access lifecycle – provisioning reduced from days to hours

whyUElement.title: Certified CyberArk Partner with proven IAM, IGA, and PAM delivery expertise
Deep specialization in Identity Security & Zero Trust architectures
Strong experience supporting telecom-scale, hybrid environments
Automation-first approach reducing risk, cost, and complexity
Future-ready identity foundation aligned with cloud, AI-driven security, and compliance
